mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TUSER ( USERID, PASSWD, USERNAME, EMAIL, UPOINT, REGDATE ) VALUES ( #{ userid }, #{ passwd }, #{ username }, #{ email }, 1000 , sysdate )
mapper.select: SELECT USERID, USERNAME, EMAIL, UPOINT, TO_CHAR( REGDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') REGDATE FROM TUSER ORDER BY USERID ASC
SELECT USERID, PASSWD, USERNAME, EMAIL, UPOINT, TO_CHAR( REGDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REGDATE FROM TUSER WHERE USERID = #{ userid }
SELECT USERID, PASSWD, USERNAME, EMAIL, UPOINT, TO_CHAR( REGDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REGDATE FROM TUSER WHERE USERID = #{ userid }
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TUSER WHERE USERID = #{ userid }
